footerText: Paw Print Find - Your pet's unique digital imprint.
openSourceFooter: Proudly Open Source - Join us on GitHub!
homeSubtitle: The fastest way to reunite with your lost pet. Create a secure digital passport today.
ecosystemDesc: Paw Print Find connects owners, finders, and vets in a seamless network.
roleOwnerStep1Desc: Build a comprehensive biometric profile with photos and marks.
roleOwnerStep2Desc: Notify the community and vets within a 5km radius instantly.
roleOwnerStep3Desc: Verify ownership through AI matching and coordinate safe pickups.
roleFinderStep1Desc: Found a stray? Take a photo. Our AI analyzes features to find a match.
roleFinderStep2Desc: Compare markings against our database in seconds.
roleFinderStep3Desc: Message the owner directly without revealing your phone number.
roleVetStep1Desc: Access health records and manage appointments.
roleVetStep2Desc: Use our AI Assistant to triage symptoms and instructions.
roleVetStep3Desc: Become a registered safe haven for lost pets.
forVetsDesc: Join our network of heroes. Help reunite families and promote your clinic.
openSourceDesc: Paw Print Find is an open-source project. We believe collaboration is key.

tagUniqueMarksDesc: Click on photos to add markers for unique features.

features.subtitle: Cutting-edge technology to protect what matters most

aiMatching.description: Advanced biometric recognition finds your pet faster than ever

realtime.description: Instant notifications when your pet is sighted nearby

testimonials.title: Beta Tester Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from our early adopters
testimonials.placeholder: Beta tester testimonials will appear here as we collect feedback during the beta phase.

q1.question: What is the beta program?
q1.answer: Our beta program gives early access to PawPrintFind's AI-powered pet safety platform. Help us test features, provide feedback, and shape the final product.

q2.question: Is the beta free?
q2.answer: Yes! Beta access is completely free. You'll get all premium features at no cost during the testing period.

q3.question: How long is the beta?
q3.answer: The beta runs until Q2 2026. Beta testers will receive special perks when we officially launch.

q4.question: What happens to my data?
q4.answer: All data is encrypted and secure. Beta accounts transition seamlessly to the full platform at launch.

q5.question: Can I invite others?
q5.answer: Yes! Beta testers will receive referral codes to invite friends and family.

q6.question: What if I find a bug?
q6.answer: Report bugs through the AI Assistant or admin dashboard. We reward active testers with exclusive badges and priority support.

thankYou.receiptNote: A digital receipt has been dispatched to your email.

scanToViewProfile: Scan to view full biometric profile

home.title: Welcome to Base
home.desc: Your primary command center. Return here anytime.

register.title: Biometric Enrollment
register.desc: Create a unique visual fingerprint for your companion.

map.title: Safety Grid
map.desc: Monitor active alerts and sightings in real-time.

community.title: Ecosystem Hub
community.desc: Access AI protocols, vet networks, and community intelligence.

emergency.title: Immediate Assistance
emergency.desc: AI Assistant standing by 24/7 for critical situations.

welcome.title: Welcome to PawPrint! 🐾
welcome.desc: PawPrintFind is your AI-powered platform to keep your pets safe. We use GPS, AI scanning, and community networks to help reunite lost pets with their families.

register.title: Register Your Pet
register.desc: Create a digital passport for your pet with photos, markings, and biometric data. This is your pet's unique identity that makes them findable anywhere in the world.

map.title: Live Missing Pets Map
map.desc: View all reported lost pets in your area in real-time. You can also report found animals and help reunite them with their owners.

community.title: Community Hub
community.desc: Connect with other pet owners, volunteers, and shelters. Share sightings, ask for help, and build a safety network around your neighborhood.

emergency.title: Emergency Button
emergency.desc: Lost your pet? Tap this button to instantly alert your entire community, nearby vets, and our AI assistant will guide you through the next steps.

karma.title: Karma & Rewards
karma.desc: Every action earns Karma Points — reporting sightings, helping others, and completing missions. Level up from Scout to Legend and earn exclusive badges!

vet.title: Find a Vet
vet.desc: Browse verified veterinary clinics near you. Book appointments, access AI health checks, and connect directly with vets who can help your pet.

welcome.title: Welcome, Doctor! 🩺
welcome.desc: Your veterinary dashboard gives you tools to manage appointments, verify your credentials, and use AI-powered diagnostics to help your patients.

verify.title: Get Verified
verify.desc: Upload your veterinary credentials to get the verified badge. Verification unlocks client trust, more appointments, and access to PRO features.

appointments.title: Manage Appointments
appointments.desc: View and manage all your appointment requests. Clients book directly through the platform — accept, reschedule, or complete appointments in one place.

ai.title: AI Health Assistant
ai.desc: Use our AI-powered preliminary health assessment tool. Analyze symptoms, get diagnostic suggestions, and save time on initial consultations.

clinic.title: Your Clinic Profile
clinic.desc: Manage your clinic's public profile, services, hours, and location. A complete profile attracts more clients and builds community trust.

pro.title: Upgrade to PRO 👑
pro.desc: PRO vets get priority listing, advanced AI features, appointment analytics, and the ability to verify shelter animals. Requires credential verification first.

welcome.title: Welcome, Shelter! 🏠
welcome.desc: Your shelter dashboard helps you manage pets for adoption, track inquiries, and connect with your local community to find loving homes.

register.title: List Pets for Adoption
register.desc: Register all your shelter animals with photos, health records, and personality profiles. AI helps match pets with compatible adopter families.

adoption.title: Adoption Center
adoption.desc: All your listed animals appear in the public Adoption Center. Track inquiries, manage applications, and coordinate meetups with potential adopters.

community.title: Engage the Community
community.desc: Share updates, post success stories, and run community campaigns. Building visibility helps animals find homes faster.

stats.title: Track Your Impact
stats.desc: Monitor adoption rates, inquiry trends, and community engagement. Use data to improve your listing strategy and reach more adopters.

welcome.title: Welcome, Volunteer! 🤝
welcome.desc: As a volunteer, you are the eyes and ears of the community. Your patrols, sightings, and missions directly help lost pets find their way home.

patrol.title: Patrol Mode 🚴
patrol.desc: Activate GPS patrol to track your route and earn Karma Points for every kilometer. Food delivery riders get bonus multipliers for reporting sightings on the go!

sighting.title: Report Sightings 👁️
sighting.desc: Spotted a lost or stray pet? Tap the emergency button or use the Found Pet scanner to instantly notify the owner and nearby helpers.

karma.title: Earn Karma ⭐
karma.desc: Every sighting, patrol, and mission earns Karma Points. Redeem them for badges, subscription upgrades, and exclusive rewards from partner stores.

missions.title: Community Missions 🎯
missions.desc: Join group missions to cover specific areas, help shelter animals, or support search parties. Missions multiply your karma earnings!

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard 🏆
leaderboard.desc: Compete with volunteers in your city. Top volunteers get featured on the community leaderboard and earn special recognition badges.

welcome.title: Admin Command Center ⚡
welcome.desc: You have full system access. Manage users, operations, finances, AI models, and community health from this central hub.

users.title: User Management 👥
users.desc: View, edit, and manage all registered users. Assign roles, verify accounts, suspend users, and track user activity across the platform.

operations.title: Operations Hub 🐾
operations.desc: Review vet verification requests, manage pet registrations, handle abuse reports, and oversee all platform operations.

finance.title: Finance & Coupons 💰
finance.desc: Track donations, manage Stripe payments, generate promotional coupon codes, and view financial analytics for the platform.

ai.title: AI Configuration 🧠
ai.desc: Switch between AI providers (Google Gemini / OpenRouter), configure model mappings for each task, and test API connections.

community.title: Community & Karma 🏆
community.desc: Manage the karma system, award badges, moderate community content, schedule social media posts, and track engagement metrics.

problemStats.title: Every year, millions of families lose their connection.
problemStats.description: Traditional methods are failing. Lost pet recovery rates haven't changed in decades, despite advances in technology. Until now.

lostAnnually.label: Lost Annually
lostAnnually.desc: Ten million pets go missing every single year across the globe.

missingProb.label: Missing Probability
missingProb.desc: A staggering 33% of all pets will disappear at least once in their lifetime.

idGap.label: Identification Gap
idGap.desc: Without digital identification, 90% of lost pets are never reunited with their owners.

solutionNarrative.title: The Paw Print Ecosystem
solutionNarrative.description: We don't just find pets. We create a permanent, digital link between families and their companions through a global, AI-powered safety net.

ecosystemHub.title: System Ecosystem
ecosystemHub.description: A centralized overview of the Paw Print autonomous safety network and its integrated AI protocols.

aiVision.title: AI Vision
aiVision.desc: Multi-modal breed and unique marking identification powered by Gemini 2.0 Pro.

triage.title: Health Triage
triage.desc: Proactive AI assessments and symptoms analysis for immediate guidance.

smartSearch.title: Smart Search
smartSearch.desc: Natural language queries to find exact matches across the global database.

geofencing.title: Smart Geofencing
geofencing.desc: Predictive safe-zone monitoring and automatic alert triggering.

alerts.title: Global Alerts
alerts.desc: Instant community-wide broadcasts for missing pet reports.

map.title: Sightings Map
map.desc: Real-time interactive tracking of verified pet encounters.

scraper.title: Social Scraper
scraper.desc: Autonomous AI agents discovering lost pet reports across social platforms.

vets.title: Vet Network
vets.desc: Integrated professional verification and patient management systems.

community.title: Community Hub
community.desc: Decentralized support network for pet owners and volunteers.

noImpronteDesc: Register your first pet to start protecting them.
